org.exist.dom
Class QName

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.dom.QName
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.lang.Comparable
public class QName
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Comparable

Represents a QName, consisting of a local name, a namespace URI and a prefix.

Author:
Wolfgang

Constructor Detail

QName

public QName(java.lang.String localName,
             java.lang.String namespaceURI,
             java.lang.String prefix)
Construct a QName. The prefix might be null for the default namespace or if no prefix has been defined for the QName. The namespace URI should be set to the empty string, if no namespace URI is defined.

Parameters:
localName -
namespaceURI -
prefix -

QName

public QName(java.lang.String localName,
             java.lang.String namespaceURI)

QName

extractPrefix

public static java.lang.String extractPrefix(java.lang.String qname)
Extract the prefix from a QName string.

Parameters:
qname -
Returns:
the prefix, if found
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the qname starts with a leading :

extractLocalName

public static java.lang.String extractLocalName(java.lang.String qname)
Extract the local name from a QName string.

Parameters:
qname -
Returns:
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if the qname starts with a leading : or ends with a :

parse

public static QName parse(XQueryContext context,
                          java.lang.String qname,
                          java.lang.String defaultNS)
                   throws XPathException
Parses the given string into a QName. The method uses context to look up a namespace URI for an existing prefix.

Parameters:
context -
qname -
Returns:
defaultNS the default namespace to use if no namespace prefix is present.
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if no namespace URI is mapped to the prefix
XPathException

parse

public static QName parse(XQueryContext context,
                          java.lang.String qname)
                   throws XPathException
Parses the given string into a QName. The method uses context to look up a namespace URI for an existing prefix. This method uses the default element namespace for qnames without prefix.

Parameters:
context -
qname -
Returns:
Throws:
java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if no namespace URI is mapped to the prefix
XPathException

isQName

public static final boolean isQName(java.lang.String name)
